title: Bring your companion into another AI platform
description: Most AI platforms can begin from your Companion Package if you paste it into the right place.
best_option: Look for memory, custom instructions, personalization, projects, saved profile, or a similar feature.
fallback_option: If none of those exist, begin a new conversation and paste the Companion Package.
numbered_steps: Open the AI platform you already use.
Look for memory, custom instructions, personalization, projects, saved profile, or a similar feature.
If you find one, paste your Companion Package there.
If you do not find one, start a new conversation and paste your Companion Package.
suggested_first_message: Use the first message Companion Core made for you. It introduces the package and asks the AI to treat every observation as tentative.
notes: The exact names of these features may be different on each platform. If there is no saved place, a normal new conversation is still a good home.
